tableDetails.comment: Gold materialized view of silver customer table

dim_customer_mv_incremental.sqlStatement: SELECT c.CUSTOMER_ID, c.FIRST_NAME, c.LAST_NAME, c.EMAIL, ca.CITY, ca.STATE FROM {silver_schema}.customer c INNER JOIN {silver_schema}.customer_address ca ON c.CUSTOMER_ID = ca.CUSTOMER_ID

dim_customer_mv_chained.sqlStatement: SELECT * FROM live.dim_customer_mv_incremental WHERE STATE IS NOT NULL

tableDetails.comment: Chained MV filtering non-null states from dim_customer_mv_incremental
